center.name: 萨米 (地区)
center.summary: 萨米 (地区)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括鹤鹬，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The spotted redshank breeds in the Arctic across much of the Palearctic, from Lapland in the west to Chukotskaya in the east

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The spotted redshank breeds in the Arctic across much of the Palearctic, from Lapland in the west to Chukotskaya in the east
